item.dc:creator: Klaxun

item.title: Date night with the wife and weight loss progress!
item.description:
Date night! June 2021 was pre-op for both of us. Wife had gastric bypass (RNY) in September 2021. I had duodenal switch (DS) in August 2021.
Hello nurse! err? Hello sunshine!
She?s such a cutie.
Here?s a full-sizes shot. This is at Disney Springs in Orlando, FL.
That?s me. I don?t have many full body shots of just me. My high weight was 350. My lowest weight was 175. I saw 200.8 pounds a week or two and freaked the heck out. I?ve been back to avoiding carbs and increased my exercise.
We shared an appetizer of butter garlic shrimp and then a dinner of some kind of lemon chicken. I was surprised at how good it was!
For dinner was a small No Way Jose that we still threw away a portion of it.
She?s such a cutie. (originally posted by @learntorv on 2023-07-17 13:46:34)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Gaming Dump
item.dc:creator: PixelSprite64

item.title: Spreading more bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: A clever saga
item.description: Thank you for getting this to the front page ! And for the awards ! However this is of course not OC by me, I just wanted to share it cause I like it a lot. As it says on each image it's made by @pet_foolery, also known for the great Pixie and Brutus comics, please redirect some (or all, really) glory their way ! https://www.instagram.com/pet_foolery

item.title: Images of Note: The teams are Auto-balanced
item.description:
ngl that is pretty fuckin awesome
metal
Donald Trump named his kid after his alter ego. http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
Richard Simmons shot Trump, prove me wrong. http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
ANIMANIAAAAAAAAAACS THOSE ARE THE FACTS!
WH40K was developed in Thatchers Britain so yeah, that was reality back then.
Ragatha looks cute here, fite me.
:D
they're on a trip.
Environmental storytelling.
I love cats
I am the only uncool transwoman, fite me.
oh no
Sometimes you just need an Arab guy to just say "no".
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Anime Expo Day 2 Vlog - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hello everyone! Thank you for the support on my last vlog video, this is day 2 out of 4 of Anime Expo 2024 in Los Angeles as a professional cosplayer and talent! That day I had my first meet and greet of the weekend so I made sure to wear my handmade Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe cosplay that I have been sharing the process of recently (you can watch the full making process here : https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7HkJr8T77ZR2LRnwALisiqCINOlcEbaD or on my Imgur profile! ) Everyone was really supportive and sweet, and many of you told me you loved seeing that cosplay in person after following the process videos, that really made me really really happy, thank you so much !!! Are you interested in seeing the last two days? Day 3 was by far the busiest I was I believe! Day 4 was more chill but lots of networking booth visits and networking parties still. Have a good day all! Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Bumblebee cosplay
item.description: Hii you all this is my first post here. My name is Lonneke also well known als Lon_cosplay. I make cosplays for 7 years now and live in the Netherlands and I am 21 years old. So here my well known video: the making my Bumblebee cosplay. My insta: www.instagram.com/lon_cosplay
item.dc:creator: loncosplay
